summary.en: Jordan deployments serving imported vehicles or public networks should confirm the required IEC 62196 connector family before procurement. AC charging commonly needs IEC 62196-2 Type 2 compatibility where European-market vehicles are served, while DC fast charging may require an IEC 62196-3 configuration such as CCS Combo 2 or another connector specified by the operator, fleet, or tender.
summary.zh: 服务进口车辆或公共网络的约旦部署应在采购前确认所需IEC 62196接口族。面向欧洲市场车辆时，交流充电通常需要兼容IEC 62196-2 Type 2；直流快充可能需要IEC 62196-3配置，例如CCS Combo 2，或运营商、车队、招标文件指定的其他接口。
summary.zht: 服務進口車輛或公共網絡的約旦部署應在採購前確認所需IEC 62196接口族。面向歐洲市場車輛時，交流充電通常需要相容IEC 62196-2 Type 2；直流快充可能需要IEC 62196-3配置，例如CCS Combo 2，或營運商、車隊、招標文件指定的其他接口。

summary.en: China-market AC and DC chargers commonly use GB/T 20234.1-2023 connection-device general requirements, GB/T 20234.2-2015 AC connector geometry and signaling, GB/T 20234.3-2023 DC connector geometry and signaling, and GB/T 27930 communication for DC charging. GB/T connectors are not physically interchangeable with IEC Type 2 or CCS2 equipment and may require redesign of the connector, cable assembly, locking, pilot or proximity circuits, communication stack, labels, and safety evaluation.
summary.zh: 中国市场交流和直流充电桩通常采用 GB/T 20234.1-2023 连接装置通用要求、GB/T 20234.2-2015 交流接口几何及信号、GB/T 20234.3-2023 直流接口几何及信号，并在直流充电中采用 GB/T 27930 通信。GB/T接口与IEC Type 2或CCS2设备不能物理互换，可能需要重新设计接口、电缆组件、锁止、控制导引或接近电路、通信栈、标签和安全评估。
summary.zht: 中國市場交流和直流充電樁通常採用 GB/T 20234.1-2023 連接裝置通用要求、GB/T 20234.2-2015 交流接口幾何及信號、GB/T 20234.3-2023 直流接口幾何及信號，並在直流充電中採用 GB/T 27930 通訊。GB/T接口與IEC Type 2或CCS2設備不能物理互換，可能需要重新設計接口、電纜組件、鎖止、控制導引或接近電路、通訊棧、標籤和安全評估。

gap.en: Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol gap, not a label change. The charger file should identify the target vehicle population, connector configuration, cable ampacity, locking and touch-protection design, communication protocol, adapter policy, and whether the same safety certificate remains valid after changing from GB/T to IEC connectors.
gap.zh: 接口转换属于硬件和协议差距，不是标签变更。充电桩资料应识别目标车辆群、接口配置、电缆载流量、锁止和防触电设计、通信协议、转接器政策，以及从GB/T改为IEC接口后同一安全证书是否仍有效。
gap.zht: 接口轉換屬於硬件和協議差距，不是標籤變更。充電樁資料應識別目標車輛群、接口配置、電纜載流量、鎖止和防觸電設計、通訊協議、轉接器政策，以及從GB/T改為IEC接口後同一安全證書是否仍有效。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where specified by procurement, fleet, public-network interoperability, site approval, or adopted standard; IEC 62196 itself is a technical standard rather than a blanket Jordan licence by itself
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China-market connector design and is not an IEC 62196 connector substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not present GB/T 20234 connectors as Jordan-ready IEC 62196 connectors. Confirm Type 2, CCS2, or other required interfaces with the site owner, operator, imported vehicle mix, and approval route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将GB/T 20234接口表述为已满足约旦IEC 62196接口要求。应与场站业主、运营商、进口车辆构成和批准路径确认Type 2、CCS2或其他所需接口。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將GB/T 20234接口表述為已滿足約旦IEC 62196接口要求。應與場站業主、營運商、進口車輛構成和批准路徑確認Type 2、CCS2或其他所需接口。
